# Smart Search 0.3.1

Smart Search 0.3.1 is a stable patch release for Zhipu MCP ZRead diagnostics and Agent search guidance.

## Fixes

- Classifies ZRead MCP `-429`, service code `1302`, and equivalent rate-limit messages as `rate_limited` instead of the generic `provider_error`.
- Applies the same error classification to both JSON-RPC errors and MCP errors returned inside tool content.
- Isolates configuration-default tests from user-level Smart Search configuration files.

## Agent skill

- Makes Smart Search CLI the preferred interface over agent-native web search and fetch tools for supported operations.
- Adds a multi-source verification workflow combining `search answer`, `search sources`, `fetch content`, and `docs` operations.

## Provider contract verification

Verified on 2026-07-23 against the official [ZRead MCP documentation](https://docs.bigmodel.cn/cn/coding-plan/mcp/zread-mcp-server) and [Coding Plan MCP overview](https://docs.bigmodel.cn/cn/coding-plan/mcp). A read-only live `tools/list` call also confirmed the current `search_doc`, `get_repo_structure`, and `read_file` schemas.

## Install or update

```bash
npm install -g @shirlytaylor73/smart-search@latest
smart-search --version
```
